name: Maloney's Mechanism
explicitMods: Trigger a Socketed Bow Skill when you Attack with a Bow, with a 1 second Cooldown
5% chance to Blind Enemies on Hit with Attacks
flavourText: Midnight tinkering begets midday murdering;
a sinister shaft surreptitiously shot slays a scoundrel.
I will see them again, but not until my work is done.

properties.name: Attack, Projectile, AoE, Melee, Strike, Fire

socketedItems.secDescrText: Infuses your melee weapon with molten energies to attack with physical and fire damage. This attack causes balls of molten magma to launch forth from the enemies you hit, divided amongst all enemies hit by the strike. These will deal area attack damage to enemies where they land.
explicitMods: 60% of Physical Damage Converted to Fire Damage
Projectiles deal 60% less Damage with Hits and Ailments
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

name: Azadi Crest
implicitMods: You take 28% reduced Extra Damage from Critical Strikes
explicitMods:
Your Lucky or Unlucky effects use the best or
worst from three rolls instead of two
flavourText: "Keita expects an assassination attempt by stealth or subterfuge.
I say we attack head-on, like madmen. Let the fates decide."
- Azadi, first ancestor of the House Azadin

properties.name: Attack, Melee, AoE, Movement, Travel, Physical

socketedItems.secDescrText: Charges at a targeted location or enemy, pushing away enemies in your path and repeatedly dealing off-hand damage in a small area in front of you. You deal damage in a larger area when you reach the target. The further you travel, the more damage you deal, and the greater your chance of stunning enemies.
explicitMods: 252 to 378 Base Off Hand Physical Damage
8 to 12 Added Physical Damage per 15 Armour or Evasion Rating on Shield
75% increased Stun Threshold reduction on enemies at Maximum charge distance
100% more Damage with Hits at Maximum Charge Distance
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

properties.name: Spell, Movement, Duration, Cold, Travel, Blink, AoE

socketedItems.secDescrText: Teleport to a location, damaging enemies and leaving Chilled ground in an area at both ends of the teleport. Shares a cooldown with other Blink skills.
explicitMods:
19% increased Cooldown Recovery Rate for each Normal or Magic Enemy in Area
99% increased Cooldown Recovery Rate for each Rare or Unique Enemy in Area
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Casts an aura that grants life regeneration to you and your allies.
explicitMods: You and nearby Allies Regenerate 10 Life per second
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

name: Doppelgänger Guise
implicitMods: +2 to Level of Socketed Minion Gems
explicitMods: 47% more Critical Strike Chance while Insane
Enemies Killed by your Hits are destroyed while Insane
39% less Physical and Chaos Damage Taken while Sane
Regenerate 10% Life over one second when Hit while Sane
flavourText: Within each of us exists a being of pure malice,
held back only by the lies we tell ourselves.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports any skill that hits enemies, or can deal burning damage directly.
explicitMods: Supported Skills deal 10% increased Burning Damage
Supported Skills deal 34% more Burning Damage
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Targets a corpse, causing it to explode, dealing fire damage. The explosion is not affected by modifiers to spell damage and cannot be reflected. Cannot target corpses that have been created by skills.
explicitMods: Explosion deals base Fire Damage equal to 34.5% of the corpse's Maximum Life
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

Enemies Ignited by you during Effect have Malediction

implicitMods: Ignites you inflict deal Damage 9% faster

socketedItems.secDescrText: Raises necromantic energies into the sky above a targeted location, where they coalesce into a zombie minion. The minion then attacks by falling to the ground, causing an impact that deals damage in an area. The zombie cannot survive the impact.
socketedItems.builtInSupport: Supported by Level 1 Chance to Bleed
explicitMods: Minions have 15% chance to deal Double Damage

socketedItems.secDescrText: Create a wall of fire for a duration, which deals burning damage to everything in its area. Each enemy that enters the wall also receives a secondary burning debuff which persists for a short duration after leaving the wall. Any projectiles fired through the wall by you and allies deal added fire damage and apply the wall's secondary debuff on hit.
explicitMods: Deals 786.8 Base Fire Damage per second
Secondary Debuff Deals 2622.7 Base Fire Damage per second
Modifiers to Spell Damage apply to this Skill's Damage Over Time effect
Maximum 4 Flame Walls at a time
Projectiles which pass through the wall deal 83 to 125 Added Fire Damage
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

who slew my beloved. There was no satisfaction, no
healing, no revenge. There was only... emptiness."
- Chieftainess Ahuana of the Ramako Tribe
